# Shake Defi

> Shake Defi provides smart-contract escrow for real-world crypto payments, helping buyers and merchants transact with verified identities, signed agreements, transparent fees, and non-custodial blockchain payment protection.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://shakedefi.com/): Overview of Shake Defi's smart-contract escrow payment app and core benefits.
- [How It Works](https://shakedefi.com/how-it-works): Explanation of Shake's non-custodial escrow process, payment release rules, refund path, and on-chain smart contract design.
- [Get Paid](https://shakedefi.com/get-paid): Merchant-focused information about accepting crypto payments, fees, escrow periods, withdrawals, and payment flexibility.
- [Send Payments](https://shakedefi.com/send-payments): Buyer-focused information about paying through escrow, transaction documentation, reputation, privacy, and dispute protection.
- [FAQ](https://shakedefi.com/faq): Common questions about escrow, supported crypto payments, fees, refunds, disputes, privacy, eligibility, and country availability.

## Reference Documents
- [White Paper](https://shakedefi.com/assets/shake_defi_whitepaper_v2-3.pdf): Technical and product background for Shake Defi.
- [Privacy Policy](https://shakedefi.com/privacy-policy): Data handling, privacy, and user information practices.
- [Terms of Service](https://shakedefi.com/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of Shake Defi services.
- [End User License Agreement](https://shakedefi.com/end-user-license-agreement): App license terms for end users.

## Contact
- [Contact Email](mailto:matt@shakedefi.com): matt@shakedefi.com
